label: Azure IaC vs Azure SaaS

proposalA.description: Infrastructure as Code for Azure — Bicep, Terraform, policy

proposalB.description: SaaS application on Azure — multi-tenant, auth, billing
proposalB.query: azure saas multi-tenant application billing authentication

rationale: IaC needs deployment/infrastructure agents; SaaS needs app architecture/auth agents

label: React Frontend vs React Native Mobile

proposalA.description: React web frontend with TypeScript and component libraries

proposalB.description: React Native mobile app with Expo and native modules
proposalB.query: react native mobile expo ios android

rationale: Web frontend needs web/CSS/component agents; mobile needs native/device agents

label: Python Web API vs Python ML Pipeline

proposalA.description: Python REST API with FastAPI and PostgreSQL
proposalA.query: python fastapi rest api web backend

proposalB.description: Python ML pipeline with PyTorch and data processing
proposalB.query: python machine learning pytorch data pipeline training

rationale: Web API needs API design/backend agents; ML needs data science/model agents

label: Java Spring Boot vs Java Android

proposalA.description: Java Spring Boot enterprise backend with microservices
proposalA.query: java spring boot enterprise microservices backend

proposalB.query: java android mobile application development ui

rationale: Spring Boot needs backend/API agents; Android needs mobile/UI agents

label: DevOps CI/CD vs DevOps Monitoring

proposalA.description: CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and deployment automation
proposalA.query: ci cd pipeline github actions deployment automation

proposalB.description: Monitoring and observability with Prometheus and Grafana
proposalB.query: monitoring observability prometheus grafana alerting logs

rationale: CI/CD needs build/deploy agents; observability needs monitoring/metrics agents

label: Security Audit vs Security Compliance

proposalA.description: Security audit — vulnerability scanning, pen testing, code review
proposalA.query: security audit vulnerability scanning penetration testing

proposalB.description: Security compliance — SOC2, ISO 27001, policy frameworks
proposalB.query: security compliance soc2 iso 27001 policy governance

rationale: Both are security-related — catalog may not distinguish well between audit and compliance

label: Technical Documentation vs ADR Writing

proposalA.description: Technical documentation — API docs, guides, tutorials
proposalA.query: technical documentation api docs writing guides

proposalB.description: Architecture Decision Records — ADRs, design rationale
proposalB.query: architecture decision record adr design rationale

rationale: Tech docs need documentation agents; ADRs need architecture/decision agents

label: Code Review vs Code Refactoring

proposalA.description: Code review — PR reviews, quality gates, standards enforcement
proposalA.query: code review pull request quality standards

proposalB.query: code refactoring restructuring cleanup modernization legacy

rationale: Review needs review/lint agents; refactoring needs refactoring/migration agents

label: Frontend Testing vs Backend Testing

proposalA.description: Frontend testing — component tests, E2E, visual regression
proposalA.query: frontend testing component e2e visual regression cypress

proposalB.description: Backend testing — unit tests, integration, API testing
proposalB.query: backend testing unit integration api testing jest

rationale: Testing agents may overlap significantly across frontend/backend
